title: Valley of the Zombies
writer: Dorrell McGowan, Stuart E. McGowan, Royal K. Cole
actors: Robert Livingston, Lorna Gray, Ian Keith
plot: Dr. Maynard (Charles Trowbridge) tells Dr. Terry Evans (Robert Livingston) and his nurse, Susan Drake (Lorna Gray), about the theft of ten pints of blood from his lab. Later, he is visited by Ormand Murks (Ian Keith), a man Maynar...
